title: Step 1a: Route groups + layout files — create (public), (owner), (admin) route groups with layout shells, migrate (protected) to (owner)
description: Create route group dirs, layout.tsx for each. (public)/layout.tsx = CustomerShell, (owner)/layout.tsx = DashboardShell + org gate, (admin)/layout.tsx = DashboardShell + admin guard. Restructure existing (protected) to (owner).

title: Step 1b: Brand components — back-button, cover-image, empty-state, required-badge, optional-badge
description: Create 5 shared brand components in src/components/brand/. BackButton (circular back arrow), CoverImage (Next.js Image wrapper), EmptyState (peach bg + message + CTA), RequiredBadge (orange pill), OptionalBadge (orange outline).

title: Step 1c: Layout components — customer-shell, customer-header, dashboard-shell, dashboard-navbar
description: Create layout shells in src/components/layout/. CustomerShell (mobile header + main), CustomerHeader (Logo + cart icon + auth link), DashboardShell (SidebarProvider + SidebarInset wrapper), DashboardNavbar (breadcrumbs + page actions).

title: Step 1d: Route config — expand app-routes.ts with all portal routes
description: Update src/common/app-routes.ts with all routes for customer (restaurant/[slug], search, orders, saved, account), owner (organization/**, restaurants/**), admin (admin/**). Update routeGroups and getRouteType.

title: Step 2a: Restaurant page route + header + server caller
description: Create server-side tRPC caller, restaurant page SSR route, loading skeleton, restaurant-header component, copy-contact-button component

title: Step 2b: Category tabs + menu display components
description: Create category-tabs, menu-section-list, menu-item-card, quick-add-button, use-category-observer hook

title: Step 2c: Menu item sheet + modifiers
description: Create menu-item-sheet with mode prop, modifier-group, modifier-option, quantity-picker, use-sheet-state hook

title: Step 2d: Menu search sheet
description: Create menu-search-sheet drawer with fuzzy search filtering

title: Step 3a: Cart store — Zustand with persist, smart merging, branch scoping, selectors
description: Create src/features/cart/stores/cart.store.ts with CartItem type, smart merging (isEqual), branch scoping, persist to localStorage. Exports: useCartItems, useCartTotal, useCartItemCount, useCartBranch, useCartActions.

title: Step 3b: Cart UI — floating button, drawer, cart item, summary
description: Create CartFloatingButton (fixed bottom, orange pill, count+total), CartDrawer (bottom Drawer, item list, edit/remove), CartItem (image, name, modifiers, qty picker, price), CartSummary (subtotal, count). All in src/features/cart/components/.

title: Step 3c: Wire cart to menu — connect store to RestaurantMenu, inline quantity pickers, floating button rendering
description: Update restaurant-menu.tsx handleSheetSubmit/handleQuickAdd to call cart.addItem. Add InlineQuantityPicker on menu item cards when in cart. Render CartFloatingButton+CartDrawer in restaurant page. Support edit mode in MenuItemSheet.

title: Step 4a: Checkout sheet — OrderTypeSelector, adaptive form, wire to cart drawer
description: Create CheckoutSheet (Drawer), OrderTypeSelector (RadioGroup dine-in/pickup), adaptive form fields, cart summary, Place Order button. Wire handleCheckout in restaurant-menu.tsx. Stub submission.

title: Step 4b: Order confirmation sheet + wire full checkout flow
description: Create OrderConfirmationSheet (success state), useCheckout hook with simulated submission. Wire: checkout submit → confirmation → cart clear. Show generated order ID.

title: Step 4b: Order confirmation sheet + wire full checkout flow
description: Create OrderConfirmationSheet (success state). Wire: checkout submit → confirmation → cart clear. Show generated order ID.

title: Step 5a: PaymentMethodCard + PaymentCountdown presentational components
description: Create payment-method-card.tsx (method type, account name/number, copy button) and payment-countdown.tsx (timer with Progress bar, MM:SS display, onExpired callback)

title: Step 5b: PaymentProofForm with validation
description: Create payment-proof-form.tsx with reference number input (required) + optional screenshot upload + submit button. react-hook-form + zod validation.

title: Step 5c: PaymentSheet + wire to checkout flow
description: Create payment-sheet.tsx composing PaymentCountdown, PaymentMethodCards, PaymentProofForm, cash option. Wire to restaurant-menu.tsx: OrderConfirmationSheet -> PaymentSheet. Stubbed payment methods + simulated submission.

title: Step 6a: Build order-tracking presentational components (StatusStep, OrderStatusTracker, OrderDetails)
description: 3 components in src/features/order-tracking/components/. StatusStep = vertical timeline step with completed/current/upcoming states. OrderStatusTracker = timeline composing StatusStep[]. OrderDetails = readonly order items + total.

title: Step 6b: Build order tracking page route with stub data and PaymentSheet wiring
description: Route: src/app/(public)/restaurant/[slug]/order/[orderId]/page.tsx. Compose OrderStatusTracker + OrderDetails + PaymentStatus section + PaymentSheet. Stub order data. Wire Upload Payment Proof button.

title: Step 7a: Discovery presentational components — HeroSection, CuisinePill, RestaurantCard, RestaurantCardList, ScanQRCTA
description: Build all discovery feature presentational components in src/features/discovery/components/. HeroSection: peach bg, Logo lg, heading, search input pill. CuisinePill: icon + label category button. RestaurantCard: Card with cover image, name, cuisine badges, preview items. RestaurantCardList: horizontal scroll (featured) + vertical (nearby) layouts. ScanQRCTA: fixed bottom orange pill button.

title: Step 7b: Discovery home page — compose components with stub data
description: Update src/app/(public)/page.tsx to compose HeroSection + CuisinePill row + FeaturedRestaurants (horizontal scroll RestaurantCardList) + NearbyRestaurants (vertical RestaurantCardList) + ScanQRCTA. Use stub data (hardcoded Filipino restaurants). Wire search input to /search route.

title: Step 7c: Search page — LocationFilter, CuisineFilter, search results with stub data
description: Build src/app/(public)/search/page.tsx with SearchBar (auto-focused, pill), CuisineFilter (horizontal pills), LocationFilter (province > city Select), and paginated RestaurantCardList with stub results. Build LocationFilter and CuisineFilter in src/features/discovery/components/.

title: Step 8: Owner registration page + post-login smart routing
description: Create OwnerRegisterForm component (email+password+org name), owner register page at /register/owner, update post-login page to check org existence for customer vs owner routing

title: Step 9a: Enhanced OwnerSidebar — collapsible Restaurant→Branch hierarchy, SidebarHeader with org name, NavUser footer
description: Move sidebar to features/owner/components. Add collapsible restaurant→branch hierarchy using tRPC hooks. Add SidebarHeader with org name + role badge. Create NavUser component for footer.

title: Step 9b: Owner layout org gate — redirect to get-started if no org
description: Update (owner)/layout.tsx to check organization.mine via server-side tRPC caller. Redirect to /organization/get-started if no org exists.

title: Step 9c: Owner dashboard page — stat cards + quick links
description: Replace placeholder dashboard with stat cards (orders today, pending, active branches, revenue) and quick action links. All data stubbed.

title: Step 10a: Onboarding hub page — SetupCard grid + progress, rewrite get-started
description: Create SetupCard component, derive completion status from existing tRPC hooks, rewrite get-started/page.tsx with card grid + progress overview

title: Step 10b: Onboarding wizard page — WizardProgress + WizardStep + 7 step forms
description: Create wizard page with URL param state, WizardProgress stepper, reusable entity forms (OrganizationForm, RestaurantForm, BranchForm), stub steps for menu/payment/verification/completion

title: Step 11a: Menu management page + item cards + category tabs + availability toggle
description: Create useManagementMenu hook, MenuItemManagementCard, and menu page at /organization/restaurants/[restaurantId]/branches/[branchId]/menu

title: Step 11b: AddCategoryDialog + delete category
description: Create AddCategoryDialog for creating/editing categories, wire delete action

title: Step 11c: AddItemDialog + EditItemDialog
description: Create dialogs for creating and editing menu items with form fields

title: Step 11d: VariantsDialog + ModifierGroupDialog
description: Create dialogs for managing variants and modifier groups+modifiers per item

title: Step 12a: Order management types + OrderRow + OrderDashboardTabs + dashboard page
description: Create order management types, OrderRow component, OrderDashboardTabs with Inbox/Active/Completed/Cancelled tabs, and the orders dashboard page at /organization/restaurants/[restaurantId]/branches/[branchId]/orders

title: Step 12b: OrderDetail + AcceptRejectActions + StatusUpdateDropdown + detail page
description: Create order detail components and the order detail page at /orders/[orderId]

title: Step 12c: PaymentProofReview + OrderTimeline
description: Create PaymentProofReview and OrderTimeline components for the order detail page

title: Step 13c: owner branch settings page
description: Build branch settings UI with weekly hours editor, ordering toggles, payment countdown, and QR preview scaffold.

title: Step 13a: owner payment config page
description: Build /organization/payments with payment method config cards, add/edit/remove actions, default selection, and a frontend scaffold store.

title: Step 13d: owner verification page
description: Build /organization/verify with document upload scaffold and verification status display.

title: Step 13e: owner restaurant and branch CRUD pages
description: Build restaurant and branch list/edit pages reusing onboarding forms for standalone management.

title: Fix: /search suspense boundary build failure
description: Production build currently fails because /(public)/search/page uses useSearchParams without a Suspense boundary during prerender.

title: Step 14b: Admin verification queue + review
description: Add /admin/verification list and detail review pages with approve/reject actions backed by a shared admin verification scaffold layered on existing restaurant data.

title: Step 14c: Admin restaurant management pages
description: Add /admin/restaurants list and detail pages with status filters, feature/deactivate actions, and shared admin data hooks.

title: Step 14d: Admin user management page
description: Add /admin/users with search and deactivate scaffold, using the shared admin portal state layer.

title: Step 15a: Order history, reorder, and review flow
description: Build /orders with auth gating, order-history cards, reorder behavior, review sheet wiring, and any required local scaffolds for missing order/review procedures.

title: Step 15b: Saved restaurants page
description: Build /saved with auth gating, saved restaurant cards, unsave interactions, and a frontend scaffold if savedRestaurant.toggle is not available yet.

title: Step 15c: Customer account page
description: Build /account for customer profile details and logout actions, reusing the existing profile data flow where possible while keeping it distinct from the owner account page.

title: Step 16: Polish pass
description: Add loading states, route-group error boundaries, responsive/a11y refinements, and remaining public-page polish after the Step 15 retention pages land.

title: Implement seed runner, fixture data, and package.json wiring
description: Create scripts/seed-demo-restaurant.ts, scripts/seed-data/demo-restaurant.ts, add db:seed:demo to package.json. Covers env validation, auth.users check, idempotent upserts for profile/user_roles/org/restaurant/branch/category/menu_item/item_variant/modifier_group/modifier, and summary output.

title: Verify seed script passes typecheck and lint
description: Run npx biome check and npx tsc --noEmit to verify the seed files compile cleanly.

title: Step 1: Database migration — 8 new schema files + profile/branch column additions + db:push
description: Create saved_restaurant, order, order_item, order_status_history, review, payment_method, verification_document, operating_hours schemas. Add portal_preference to profile, lat/lng to branch. Export from index.ts. Run pnpm db:push.

title: Step 2: Storage infrastructure — buckets, upload utilities
Step 3: Portal separation — portal_preference enforcement
Step 4: Discovery backend — featured, nearby, search, locations
Step 5: Saved restaurants — backend integration
Step 6: Order system — full lifecycle
Step 7: Reviews — create and display
Step 8: Payment config — org-scoped persistence
Step 9: Verification — real document uploads
Step 10: Operating hours — backend persistence
Step 11: Admin user access — persisted toggle
Step 12: Onboarding wizard — honest completion
Step 13: Owner nav — fix dead links
Step 14: Component fixes — breadcrumb, dialog, image upload
Step 15: QR scanner — browser camera
Step 16: Discovery UI — save-for-later polish
Step 17: Seed data — Cebu City restaurants
Step 18: E2E verification — Playwright tests
Step 1: Feature flag system
description: Create typed, env-backed feature flag config, env validation, tRPC query

title: Step 2: Portal slug column and generation
description: Add portalSlug to branch, generation utility, backfill

title: Step 3: Branch portal route group and layout shell
description: Add branch route type to app-routes.ts, create (branch)/branch/[portalSlug]/layout.tsx with flag gate + auth + portalSlug resolution, BranchPortalShell component, placeholder page

title: Step 4: Branch portal nav and page scaffolding
description: Add branch.listAccessible tRPC, create branch-portal-sidebar, branch-portal-bottom-nav, wire into layout with DashboardShell, unit tests

title: Step 5: Branch portal pages (reuse existing components)
description: Create 6 page files under (branch)/branch/[portalSlug]/: overview, orders list, order detail, menu, tables, settings. Add BranchPortalProvider context. Adapt breadcrumbs and links for portal context.

title: Step 6: Owner sidebar v2 with task-oriented flat groups
description: Create sidebar-v2.tsx with 5 flat groups (Setup, Overview, Restaurants, Branch Ops placeholder, Team Access placeholder, Account). Update layout to conditionally render based on flags.ownerConsoleSidebarV2. Tests.

title: Step 7: Workspace switcher in owner sidebar
description: Create workspace Zustand store, WorkspaceSwitcher component in sidebar-v2, flag-gated via showWorkspaceSwitcher prop, unit tests

title: Step 8: Wire branch shortcuts in sidebar-v2 Branch Operations group
description: Replace Branch Operations placeholder with actual branch shortcuts. Use branch.listAccessible for data, filter by workspace store selection, link to /branch/:portalSlug or fallback to owner console URL. Limit 10 + View all. Add open-in-new-tab button. Unit tests.

title: Step 9: Team access data model — schema, repos, services, errors, DTOs, factory, tests
description: Create team_membership, scoped_assignment, team_invite Drizzle schemas. Build team-access module with membership/assignment/invite repositories, membership+assignment services, hasAccess method, error classes, DTOs, factory. Generate migration. Register router stub. Unit tests.

title: Step 10a: InviteService + AcceptInviteUseCase + invite router procedures + tests
description: Create InviteService (create/list/revoke/validate), AcceptInviteUseCase (transaction orchestration), invite sub-router (5 procedures), DTOs, factory updates, and unit tests

title: Step 10b: Team invite landing page at (auth)/register/team
description: Create team invite landing page that reads ?token= param, validates invite, and shows accept/register UI

title: Step 11: Team Access UI in owner console
description: Backend enrichment (listMembers + invite.list with profile/assignment/scope data, revokeMember procedure), frontend hooks, members page, invites page, invite dialog, sidebar wiring, tests

title: Step 12: Branch-scoped authorization in layout + access level in context
description: Update branch portal layout to use AssignmentService.hasAccess when branchScopedStaffAccess flag is on. Add getBranchAccessLevel helper. Expose accessLevel in BranchPortalProvider context. Unit tests.

title: Implement smart post-login redirect for branch staff
description: Add branch-aware post-login redirect logic with explicit redirect override and tests.

title: Validate branch ops rollout and dogfooding checklist
description: Add rollout checklist and final validation coverage for branch portal, owner console v2, and team access.

title: Allow business-scoped team members into owner console
description: Owner layout and downstream owner-console auth still assume org ownership; add scoped member access before routing business assignments there.
